name: OnActorStreamIn
documentationSummary: Called when an actor streams in for a player.

name: OnActorStreamOut
documentationSummary: Called when an actor streams out for a player.

name: OnDialogResponse
documentationSummary: Called when a player responds to a dialog.

name: OnFilterScriptExit
documentationSummary: Called when a filterscript is unloaded.

name: OnFilterScriptInit
documentationSummary: Called when a filterscript is loaded.

name: OnGameModeExit
documentationSummary: Called when a gamemode ends, either through GameModeExit or server shutdown.

name: OnGameModeInit
callbackContext: Runs once at gamemode load, before any player connects.
documentationSummary: Called when the gamemode is initialized, right after OnGameModeInit's script loads.

name: OnIncomingConnection
documentationSummary: Called when an IP address attempts a connection to the server, before OnPlayerConnect.

name: OnObjectMoved
documentationSummary: Called when a global object finishes moving.

name: OnPlayerCommandText
callbackContext: Return 1 to indicate the command was handled; 0 shows the client's "unknown command" message.
documentationSummary: Called when a player enters a command into the client chat window (text starting with '/').

name: OnPlayerConnect
callbackContext: Fires once per connecting player, before OnPlayerRequestClass.
documentationSummary: Called when a player connects to the server.

name: OnPlayerDeath
callbackContext: killerid is INVALID_PLAYER_ID for suicides/environmental deaths.
documentationSummary: Called when a player dies, by suicide or by another player.

name: OnPlayerDisconnect
callbackContext: playerid is no longer valid for most natives once this callback returns.
documentationSummary: Called when a player disconnects from the server.

name: OnPlayerEditAttachedObject
documentationSummary: Called when a player finishes editing an attached object.

name: OnPlayerEditObject
documentationSummary: Called while a player edits an object and when editing ends.

name: OnPlayerEnterCheckpoint
documentationSummary: Called when a player enters their checkpoint.

name: OnPlayerEnterRaceCheckpoint
documentationSummary: Called when a player enters their race checkpoint.

name: OnPlayerEnterVehicle
documentationSummary: Called when a player starts to enter a vehicle, before the entry animation completes.

name: OnPlayerExitVehicle
callbackContext: Not called if the player falls off a bike/bicycle or is removed by RemovePlayerFromVehicle.
documentationSummary: Called when a player exits a vehicle.

name: OnPlayerExitedMenu
documentationSummary: Called when a player exits a menu.

name: OnPlayerGiveDamageActor
documentationSummary: Called when a player damages an actor.

name: OnPlayerLeaveCheckpoint
documentationSummary: Called when a player leaves their checkpoint.

name: OnPlayerLeaveRaceCheckpoint
documentationSummary: Called when a player leaves their race checkpoint.

name: OnPlayerObjectMoved
documentationSummary: Called when a player object finishes moving.

name: OnPlayerRequestClass
documentationSummary: Called when a player changes class at class selection.

name: OnPlayerRequestSpawn
callbackContext: Return 0 to prevent the player from spawning.
documentationSummary: Called when a player attempts to spawn via class selection.

name: OnPlayerSelectObject
documentationSummary: Called when a player selects an object.

name: OnPlayerSelectedMenuRow
documentationSummary: Called when a player selects a menu row.

name: OnPlayerSpawn
documentationSummary: Called when a player spawns, i.e. after SpawnPlayer.

name: OnPlayerStateChange
documentationSummary: Called when a player changes state, e.g. from vehicle driver to on-foot.

name: OnPlayerText
callbackContext: Returning 0 in this callback suppresses the chat message.
documentationSummary: Called when a player sends a chat message.

name: OnVehicleDeath
documentationSummary: Called when a vehicle is destroyed, by exploding or becoming submerged.

name: OnVehicleSpawn
documentationSummary: Called when a vehicle respawns.

name: DIALOG_STYLE_INPUT
documentationSummary: Dialog style value 1.

name: DIALOG_STYLE_LIST
documentationSummary: Dialog style value 2.

name: DIALOG_STYLE_MSGBOX
documentationSummary: Dialog style value 0.

name: DIALOG_STYLE_PASSWORD
documentationSummary: Dialog style value 3.

name: DIALOG_STYLE_TABLIST
documentationSummary: Dialog style value 4.

name: DIALOG_STYLE_TABLIST_HEADERS
documentationSummary: Dialog style value 5.

name: EDIT_RESPONSE_CANCEL
documentationSummary: The player cancelled object editing.

name: EDIT_RESPONSE_FINAL
documentationSummary: The player saved the object edit.

name: EDIT_RESPONSE_UPDATE
documentationSummary: The player moved the object while editing.

name: INVALID_ACTOR_ID
documentationSummary: Sentinel used when no valid actor ID is available.

name: INVALID_MENU
constraints: SA-MP encodes this sentinel as 255; open.mp uses -1.
documentationSummary: Sentinel used when no valid menu ID is available.

name: INVALID_OBJECT_ID
documentationSummary: Value used when no valid object exists.

name: INVALID_PLAYER_ID
documentationSummary: Sentinel used where no player applies (e.g. a killerid with no killer).

name: INVALID_VEHICLE_ID
documentationSummary: Sentinel returned by CreateVehicle and friends on failure, and used where no vehicle applies.

name: MAX_DIALOG
documentationSummary: Exclusive upper bound for dialog IDs.

name: MAX_MENUS
documentationSummary: Maximum number of menus the server can hold.

name: MAX_OBJECT_MATERIAL_SLOTS
documentationSummary: Maximum material slots per object.

name: MAX_PLAYERS
documentationSummary: Maximum number of player slots the server allocates. Redefine before including <open.mp> to change it.

name: MAX_PLAYER_ATTACHED_OBJECTS
documentationSummary: Maximum attached-object slots per player.

name: MAX_VEHICLES
documentationSummary: Maximum number of vehicle slots the server allocates. Redefine before including <open.mp> to change it.

name: NO_TEAM
documentationSummary: Default team value meaning "not on any team"; also usable with SetPlayerTeam to remove a player from all teams.

name: OBJECT_MATERIAL_SIZE_128x128
documentationSummary: Object material text size 128x128.

name: OBJECT_MATERIAL_SIZE_128x32
documentationSummary: Object material text size 128x32.

name: OBJECT_MATERIAL_SIZE_128x64
documentationSummary: Object material text size 128x64.

name: OBJECT_MATERIAL_SIZE_256x128
documentationSummary: Object material text size 256x128.

name: OBJECT_MATERIAL_SIZE_256x256
documentationSummary: Object material text size 256x256.

name: OBJECT_MATERIAL_SIZE_256x32
documentationSummary: Object material text size 256x32.

name: OBJECT_MATERIAL_SIZE_256x64
documentationSummary: Object material text size 256x64.

name: OBJECT_MATERIAL_SIZE_32x32
documentationSummary: Object material text size 32x32.

name: OBJECT_MATERIAL_SIZE_512x128
documentationSummary: Object material text size 512x128.

name: OBJECT_MATERIAL_SIZE_512x256
documentationSummary: Object material text size 512x256.

name: OBJECT_MATERIAL_SIZE_512x512
documentationSummary: Object material text size 512x512.

name: OBJECT_MATERIAL_SIZE_512x64
documentationSummary: Object material text size 512x64.

name: OBJECT_MATERIAL_SIZE_64x32
documentationSummary: Object material text size 64x32.

name: OBJECT_MATERIAL_SIZE_64x64
documentationSummary: Object material text size 64x64.

name: OBJECT_MATERIAL_TEXT_ALIGN_CENT
documentationSummary: Centered object material text.

name: OBJECT_MATERIAL_TEXT_ALIGN_CENTER
documentationSummary: Centered object material text.

name: OBJECT_MATERIAL_TEXT_ALIGN_CENTRE
documentationSummary: Centered object material text.

name: OBJECT_MATERIAL_TEXT_ALIGN_LEFT
documentationSummary: Left-aligned object material text.

name: OBJECT_MATERIAL_TEXT_ALIGN_RIGHT
documentationSummary: Right-aligned object material text.

name: OBJECT_MATERIAL_TEXT_ALIGN_RIGT
documentationSummary: Right-aligned object material text.

name: SELECT_OBJECT_GLOBAL_OBJECT
documentationSummary: A selected global object.

name: SELECT_OBJECT_PLAYER_OBJECT
documentationSummary: A selected player object.

name: UNKNOWN_DIALOG_STYLE
documentationSummary: Sentinel used when no dialog style is available.

name: UNKNOWN_EDIT_RESPONSE
documentationSummary: Unknown object editing response.

name: UNKNOWN_OBJECT_MATERIAL_SIZE
documentationSummary: Unknown object material text size.

name: UNKNOWN_OBJECT_MATERIAL_TEXT_ALIGN
documentationSummary: Unknown object material text alignment.

name: UNKNOWN_SELECT_OBJECT
documentationSummary: Unknown object selection type.

name: AddCharModel
constraints: Available in SA-MP 0.3.DL, not SA-MP 0.3.7.
documentationSummary: Adds a custom character model.

name: AddMenuItem
constraints: Formatting arguments are available only under the openmp profile.
documentationSummary: Adds an item to a menu.

name: AddSimpleModel
constraints: Available in SA-MP 0.3.DL, not SA-MP 0.3.7.
documentationSummary: Adds a custom model.

name: AddSimpleModelTimed
constraints: Available in SA-MP 0.3.DL, not SA-MP 0.3.7.
documentationSummary: Adds a custom model available during set hours.

name: AddVehicleComponent

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if the component is invalid for the vehicle model.

documentationSummary: Adds a component (a 'mod') to a vehicle.

name: ApplyActorAnimation
documentationSummary: Applies an animation to an actor.

name: AttachObjectToObject
documentationSummary: Attaches one global object to another.

name: AttachObjectToPlayer
documentationSummary: Attaches a global object to a player.

name: AttachObjectToVehicle
documentationSummary: Attaches a global object to a vehicle.

name: AttachPlayerObjectToObject
documentationSummary: Attaches one player object to another.

name: AttachPlayerObjectToPlayer
documentationSummary: Attaches a player object to a player.

name: AttachPlayerObjectToVehicle
documentationSummary: Attaches a player object to a vehicle.

name: BeginObjectEditing
documentationSummary: Lets a player edit a global object's position and rotation.

name: BeginObjectSelecting
documentationSummary: Lets a player select an object with the cursor.

name: BeginPlayerObjectEditing
documentationSummary: Lets a player edit a player object's position and rotation.

name: CancelEdit
documentationSummary: Ends object editing or selection for a player.

name: ClearActorAnimations
documentationSummary: Stops an actor's current animation.

name: CreateActor
documentationSummary: Creates a static actor without using a player slot.

name: CreateMenu
constraints: Formatting arguments are available only under the openmp profile.
documentationSummary: Creates a menu.

name: CreateObject
documentationSummary: Creates a global object.

name: CreatePlayerObject
documentationSummary: Creates an object for one player.

name: CreateVehicle

signature.returnSemantics: The created vehicle's id, or INVALID_VEHICLE_ID (65535) on failure.

constraints: respawnDelay of -1 disables automatic respawn.
documentationSummary: Creates a vehicle in the world.

name: DestroyActor
documentationSummary: Destroys an actor.

name: DestroyMenu
documentationSummary: Destroys a menu.

name: DestroyObject
documentationSummary: Destroys a global object.

name: DestroyPlayerObject
documentationSummary: Destroys a player object.

name: DestroyVehicle

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if vehicleid does not exist.

documentationSummary: Destroys a vehicle; it disappears instantly.

name: DisableMenu
documentationSummary: Disables a menu.

name: DisableMenuRow
documentationSummary: Disables a row in a menu.

name: DisablePlayerCheckpoint
documentationSummary: Hides a player's checkpoint.

name: DisablePlayerRaceCheckpoint
documentationSummary: Hides a player's race checkpoint.

name: EditAttachedObject
documentationSummary: Lets a player edit an attached object.

name: EditObject
documentationSummary: Lets a player edit a global object's position and rotation.

name: EditPlayerObject
documentationSummary: Lets a player edit a player object's position and rotation.

name: EndObjectEditing
documentationSummary: Ends object editing or selection for a player.

name: FindModelFileNameFromCRC
constraints: Available in SA-MP 0.3.DL, not SA-MP 0.3.7.
documentationSummary: Finds a model file by its CRC.

name: FindTextureFileNameFromCRC
constraints: Available in SA-MP 0.3.DL, not SA-MP 0.3.7.
documentationSummary: Finds a texture file by its CRC.

name: GetActorAnimation
documentationSummary: Returns an actor's current animation.

name: GetActorFacingAngle
documentationSummary: Returns the direction an actor faces.

name: GetActorHealth
documentationSummary: Returns an actor's health.

name: GetActorPos
documentationSummary: Returns an actor's position.

name: GetActorSkin
documentationSummary: Returns an actor's skin.

name: GetActorSpawnInfo
documentationSummary: Returns an actor's initial skin, position, and angle.

name: GetActorVirtualWorld
documentationSummary: Returns an actor's virtual world.

name: GetActors
documentationSummary: Writes the active actor IDs to an array.

name: GetCustomModelPath
documentationSummary: Gets the files used by a custom model.

name: GetMenuColumnHeader
documentationSummary: Returns a menu column heading.

name: GetMenuColumnWidth
documentationSummary: Returns a menu's column widths.

name: GetMenuColumns
documentationSummary: Returns the number of columns in a menu.

name: GetMenuItem
documentationSummary: Returns the text of a menu item.

name: GetMenuItems
documentationSummary: Returns the number of items in a menu column.

name: GetMenuPos
documentationSummary: Returns a menu's position.

name: GetObjectAttachedData
documentationSummary: Gets the entities attached to a global object.

name: GetObjectAttachedOffset
documentationSummary: Gets a global object's attachment offset.

name: GetObjectDrawDistance
documentationSummary: Returns a global object's draw distance.

name: GetObjectMaterial
documentationSummary: Gets a global object's material.

name: GetObjectMaterialText
documentationSummary: Gets a global object's material text.

name: GetObjectModel
documentationSummary: Returns a global object's model ID.

name: GetObjectMoveSpeed
documentationSummary: Returns a global object's movement speed.

name: GetObjectMovingTargetPos
documentationSummary: Gets a global object's movement target position.

name: GetObjectMovingTargetRot
documentationSummary: Gets a global object's movement target rotation.

name: GetObjectPos
documentationSummary: Gets a global object's position.

name: GetObjectRot
documentationSummary: Gets a global object's rotation.

name: GetObjectSyncRotation
documentationSummary: Checks whether an attached global object inherits rotation.

name: GetObjectTarget
documentationSummary: Gets a global object's movement target.

name: GetObjectType
documentationSummary: Returns the type of an object visible to a player.

name: GetPlayerArmour

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if playerid is not connected.

documentationSummary: Stores the armour of a player into a variable.

name: GetPlayerAttachedObject
documentationSummary: Gets data for a player's attached-object slot.

name: GetPlayerCameraTargetPlayerObj
documentationSummary: Returns the player object targeted by a player's camera.

name: GetPlayerCameraTargetPlayerObject
documentationSummary: Returns the player object targeted by a player's camera.

name: GetPlayerCheckpoint
documentationSummary: Returns a player's checkpoint position and radius.

name: GetPlayerColor

signature.returnSemantics: The player's ARGB colour.

constraints: Only meaningful after SetPlayerColor or an automatically-assigned default colour.
documentationSummary: Gets the colour of the player's name and radar marker.

name: GetPlayerDialog
documentationSummary: Returns the ID of a player's current dialog.

name: GetPlayerDialogData
documentationSummary: Returns the data for a player's current dialog.

name: GetPlayerDialogID
documentationSummary: Returns the ID of a player's current dialog.

name: GetPlayerFacingAngle

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if playerid is not connected.

documentationSummary: Gets the angle a player is facing.

name: GetPlayerHealth

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if playerid is not connected.

documentationSummary: Retrieves the health of a player.

name: GetPlayerInterior

signature.returnSemantics: The interior id the player is currently in.

constraints: Always returns 0 for NPCs.
documentationSummary: Retrieves the player's current interior.

name: GetPlayerMenu
documentationSummary: Returns the menu shown to a player.

name: GetPlayerMoney

signature.returnSemantics: The amount of money the player has.

documentationSummary: Retrieves the amount of money a player has.

name: GetPlayerName

signature.returnSemantics: The length of the player name copied into name.

documentationSummary: Gets a player's name.

name: GetPlayerObjectAttachedData
documentationSummary: Gets the entities attached to a player object.

name: GetPlayerObjectAttachedOffset
documentationSummary: Gets a player object's attachment offset.

name: GetPlayerObjectDrawDistance
documentationSummary: Returns a player object's draw distance.

name: GetPlayerObjectMaterial
documentationSummary: Gets a player object's material.

name: GetPlayerObjectMaterialText
documentationSummary: Gets a player object's material text.

name: GetPlayerObjectModel
documentationSummary: Returns a player object's model ID.

name: GetPlayerObjectMoveSpeed
documentationSummary: Returns a player object's movement speed.

name: GetPlayerObjectMovingTargetPos
documentationSummary: Gets a player object's movement target position.

name: GetPlayerObjectMovingTargetRot
documentationSummary: Gets a player object's movement target rotation.

name: GetPlayerObjectPos
documentationSummary: Gets a player object's position.

name: GetPlayerObjectRot
documentationSummary: Gets a player object's rotation.

name: GetPlayerObjectSyncRotation
documentationSummary: Checks whether an attached player object inherits rotation.

name: GetPlayerObjectTarget
documentationSummary: Gets a player object's movement target.

name: GetPlayerPos

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if playerid is not connected.

documentationSummary: Gets the position of a player.

name: GetPlayerRaceCheckpoint
documentationSummary: Returns a player's race checkpoint data.

name: GetPlayerScore

signature.returnSemantics: The player's score.

documentationSummary: Returns a player's score as set with SetPlayerScore.

name: GetPlayerSkin

signature.returnSemantics: The player's current skin id.

documentationSummary: Returns the class of the player's skin.

name: GetPlayerSurfingPlayerObjectID
documentationSummary: Returns the player object a player is surfing.

name: GetPlayerTeam

signature.returnSemantics: The team id, or NO_TEAM (255) if not on a team.

documentationSummary: Gets the ID of the team the player is on.

name: GetPlayerVehicleID

signature.returnSemantics: The vehicle id, or 0 if the player is not in a vehicle.

constraints: Not the model id of the vehicle; see native:GetVehicleModel.
documentationSummary: Gets the ID of the vehicle the player is currently in.

name: GetPlayerVelocity

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if playerid is not connected.

documentationSummary: Gets the velocity (speed) of a player on the x, y and z axes.

name: GetPlayerVirtualWorld

signature.returnSemantics: The virtual world id the player is currently in.

documentationSummary: Retrieves the current virtual world the player is in.

name: GetVehicleHealth

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if vehicleid does not exist.

documentationSummary: Gets the health of a vehicle.

name: GetVehicleModel

signature.returnSemantics: The vehicle's model id (400-611), or 0 if vehicleid does not exist.

documentationSummary: Gets the model id of a vehicle.

name: GetVehiclePos

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if vehicleid does not exist.

documentationSummary: Gets the position of a vehicle.

name: GetVehicleVelocity

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if vehicleid does not exist.

documentationSummary: Gets the velocity of a vehicle on the x, y and z axes.

name: GetVehicleZAngle

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if vehicleid does not exist.

documentationSummary: Gets the rotation of a vehicle on the z axis (yaw).

name: GivePlayerMoney

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if playerid is not connected.

constraints: money may be negative to deduct funds.
documentationSummary: Gives money to or takes money from a player.

name: GivePlayerWeapon

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if playerid is not connected.

documentationSummary: Gives a player a weapon with a specified amount of ammo.

name: HideMenuForPlayer
documentationSummary: Hides a menu from a player.

name: HidePlayerDialog
documentationSummary: Hides a player's current dialog.

name: IsActorInvulnerable
documentationSummary: Reports whether an actor is invulnerable.

name: IsActorStreamedIn
documentationSummary: Reports whether an actor is streamed in for a player.

name: IsMenuDisabled
documentationSummary: Reports whether a menu is disabled.

name: IsMenuRowDisabled
documentationSummary: Reports whether a menu row is disabled.

name: IsObjectMaterialSlotUsed
documentationSummary: Returns how a global-object material slot is used.

name: IsObjectMoving
documentationSummary: Checks whether a global object is moving.

name: IsObjectNoCameraCol

deprecated.reason: Deprecated by open.mp; the pinned include has no replacement declaration.

documentationSummary: Checks whether camera collision is disabled for a global object.

name: IsPlayerAttachedObjectSlotUsed
documentationSummary: Checks whether a player's attached-object slot is used.

name: IsPlayerCheckpointActive
documentationSummary: Reports whether a player has an active checkpoint.

name: IsPlayerConnected

signature.returnSemantics: 1 if connected, 0 otherwise.

documentationSummary: Checks if a player is connected.

name: IsPlayerInAnyVehicle

signature.returnSemantics: 1 if the player is in a vehicle, 0 otherwise.

documentationSummary: Checks if a player is inside any vehicle, as driver or passenger.

name: IsPlayerInCheckpoint
documentationSummary: Reports whether a player is inside their checkpoint.

name: IsPlayerInRaceCheckpoint
documentationSummary: Reports whether a player is inside their race checkpoint.

name: IsPlayerInVehicle

signature.returnSemantics: 1 if the player is in the given vehicle, 0 otherwise.

documentationSummary: Checks if a player is in a specific vehicle.

name: IsPlayerObjectMaterialSlotUsed
documentationSummary: Returns how a player-object material slot is used.

name: IsPlayerObjectMoving
documentationSummary: Checks whether a player object is moving.

name: IsPlayerObjectNoCameraCol

deprecated.reason: Deprecated by open.mp; the pinned include has no replacement declaration.

documentationSummary: Checks whether camera collision is disabled for a player object.

name: IsPlayerRaceCheckpointActive
documentationSummary: Reports whether a player has an active race checkpoint.

name: IsValidActor
documentationSummary: Reports whether an actor ID is valid.

name: IsValidCustomModel
documentationSummary: Checks whether a custom model exists.

name: IsValidMenu
documentationSummary: Reports whether a menu ID is valid.

name: IsValidObject
documentationSummary: Checks whether a global object exists.

name: IsValidPlayerObject
documentationSummary: Checks whether a player object exists.

name: IsValidVehicle

signature.returnSemantics: 1 if valid, 0 otherwise.

documentationSummary: Checks if a vehicle id is valid.

name: MoveObject
documentationSummary: Moves a global object towards a position.

name: MovePlayerObject
documentationSummary: Moves a player object towards a position.

name: PutPlayerInVehicle

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if playerid or vehicleid does not exist.

constraints: seatid 0 is the driver seat; occupied seats silently fail.
documentationSummary: Puts a player in a vehicle.

name: RedirectDownload
constraints: Available in SA-MP 0.3.DL, not SA-MP 0.3.7.
documentationSummary: Redirects a player's model download.

name: RemovePlayerAttachedObject
documentationSummary: Removes an object from a player's attached-object slot.

name: RemovePlayerFromVehicle

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if playerid is not in a vehicle.

constraints: The force parameter is an open.mp addition; SA-MP 0.3.7 always behaves as force=false.
documentationSummary: Removes/ejects a player from their vehicle.

name: RemoveVehicleComponent

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if the component was not fitted.

documentationSummary: Removes a component from a vehicle.

name: RepairVehicle

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if vehicleid does not exist.

documentationSummary: Fully repairs a vehicle, including visual damage.

name: SelectObject
documentationSummary: Lets a player select an object with the cursor.

name: SendClientMessage

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if playerid is not connected.

constraints: Accepts printf-style trailing arguments after format (OPEN_MP_TAGS variadic), not represented as fixed parameters.
documentationSummary: Sends a message to a specific player with a chosen colour in the chat.

name: SetActorFacingAngle
documentationSummary: Changes the direction an actor faces.

name: SetActorHealth
documentationSummary: Changes an actor's health.

name: SetActorInvulnerable
documentationSummary: Changes whether an actor can take damage.

name: SetActorPos
documentationSummary: Moves an actor.

name: SetActorSkin
documentationSummary: Changes an actor's skin.

name: SetActorVirtualWorld
documentationSummary: Moves an actor to a virtual world.

name: SetMenuColumnHeader
constraints: Formatting arguments are available only under the openmp profile.
documentationSummary: Sets a menu column heading.

name: SetObjectMaterial
documentationSummary: Replaces a global object's material.

name: SetObjectMaterialText
constraints: Formatting arguments are available in open.mp.
documentationSummary: Replaces a global object's material with text.

name: SetObjectMoveSpeed
documentationSummary: Sets a global object's movement speed.

name: SetObjectNoCameraCol
documentationSummary: Disables camera collision for a global object.

name: SetObjectNoCameraCollision
documentationSummary: Disables camera collision for a global object.

name: SetObjectPos
documentationSummary: Sets a global object's position.

name: SetObjectRot
documentationSummary: Sets a global object's rotation.

name: SetObjectsDefaultCameraCol
documentationSummary: Sets the default camera-collision behavior for newly created objects.

name: SetObjectsDefaultCameraCollision
documentationSummary: Sets the default camera-collision behavior for newly created objects.

name: SetPlayerArmour

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if playerid is not connected.

documentationSummary: Sets a player's armour level.

name: SetPlayerAttachedObject
documentationSummary: Sets an object in a player's attached-object slot.

name: SetPlayerCheckpoint
documentationSummary: Shows a checkpoint to a player.

name: SetPlayerColor

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if playerid is not connected.

documentationSummary: Sets the colour of a player's nametag and marker.

name: SetPlayerFacingAngle

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if playerid is not connected.

documentationSummary: Sets a player's facing angle (z rotation).

name: SetPlayerHealth

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if playerid is not connected.

constraints: Health <= 0 kills the player.
documentationSummary: Sets the health of a player.

name: SetPlayerInterior

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if playerid is not connected.

documentationSummary: Sets a player's interior.

name: SetPlayerName

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if not connected or name in use, -1 if the name is invalid.

constraints: name must be 1-24 characters using only the allowed SA-MP nickname character set.
documentationSummary: Sets the name of a player.

name: SetPlayerObjectMaterial
documentationSummary: Replaces a player object's material.

name: SetPlayerObjectMaterialText
constraints: Formatting arguments are available in open.mp.
documentationSummary: Replaces a player object's material with text.

name: SetPlayerObjectMoveSpeed
documentationSummary: Sets a player object's movement speed.

name: SetPlayerObjectNoCameraCol
documentationSummary: Disables camera collision for a player object.

name: SetPlayerObjectNoCameraCollision
documentationSummary: Disables camera collision for a player object.

name: SetPlayerObjectPos
documentationSummary: Sets a player object's position.

name: SetPlayerObjectRot
documentationSummary: Sets a player object's rotation.

name: SetPlayerPos

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if playerid is not connected.

constraints: Removes the player from any vehicle they are in.
documentationSummary: Sets a player's position.

name: SetPlayerRaceCheckpoint
documentationSummary: Shows a race checkpoint to a player.

name: SetPlayerScore

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if playerid is not connected.

documentationSummary: Sets a player's score, shown in the scoreboard.

name: SetPlayerSkin

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if playerid is not connected.

constraints: Changing a player's skin while they are in a vehicle can cause visual glitches.
documentationSummary: Sets the skin (character model) of a player.

name: SetPlayerTeam

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if playerid is not connected.

constraints: Use NO_TEAM (255) to remove the player from all teams.
documentationSummary: Sets the team of a player.

name: SetPlayerVelocity

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if playerid is not connected.

documentationSummary: Sets a player's velocity on the x, y and z axes.

name: SetPlayerVirtualWorld

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if playerid is not connected.

documentationSummary: Sets the virtual world of a player.

name: SetSpawnInfo

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if playerid is not connected.

documentationSummary: Changes the spawn information of a specific player: weapons, team, skin, and spawn position.

name: SetVehicleHealth

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if vehicleid does not exist.

constraints: Below 250 the engine catches fire; below 0 the vehicle explodes.
documentationSummary: Sets a vehicle's health.

name: SetVehicleNumberPlate

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if vehicleid does not exist.

constraints: Maximum plate length is 32 characters.
documentationSummary: Sets a vehicle's number plate.

name: SetVehiclePos

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if vehicleid does not exist.

documentationSummary: Sets a vehicle's position.

name: SetVehicleVelocity

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if vehicleid does not exist.

documentationSummary: Sets the x, y and z velocity of a vehicle.

name: SetVehicleZAngle

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if vehicleid does not exist.

documentationSummary: Sets the z rotation (yaw) of a vehicle.

name: ShowMenuForPlayer
documentationSummary: Shows a menu to a player.

name: ShowPlayerDialog
constraints: Formatting arguments are available only under the openmp profile.
documentationSummary: Shows a dialog to a player.

name: SpawnPlayer

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if playerid is not connected.

documentationSummary: (Re)spawns a player.

name: StopObject
documentationSummary: Stops a moving global object.

name: StopPlayerObject
documentationSummary: Stops a moving player object.

name: TogglePlayerControllable

signature.returnSemantics: 1 on success, 0 if playerid is not connected.

documentationSummary: Toggles whether a player can control their character.

name: CP_TYPE
documentationSummary: Tag used for race checkpoint types.

name: DIALOG_STYLE
documentationSummary: Tag used for dialog styles.

name: EDIT_RESPONSE
documentationSummary: Tags object editing responses.

name: Float
documentationSummary: IEEE-754 single-precision floating point tag used throughout the Pawn standard library and open.mp API.

name: Menu
documentationSummary: Tag used for menu IDs.

name: OBJECT_MATERIAL_SIZE
documentationSummary: Tags object material text sizes.

name: OBJECT_MATERIAL_TEXT_ALIGN
documentationSummary: Tags object material text alignments.

name: SELECT_OBJECT
documentationSummary: Tags object selection types.

name: WEAPON
documentationSummary: Enum tag identifying a weapon model id (e.g. WEAPON_FIST, WEAPON_DEAGLE).

name: bool
documentationSummary: Boolean tag; false is 0, true is any non-zero cell value.
